subject: chemistry
title: 18M.1.SL.TZ1.27
question_html:
Which compound could be formed when CH3CH2CH2OH is heated with acidified potassium dichromate(VI)?

        I.     CH3CH2CHO

        II.     CH3CH2COOH

        III.     CH3COCH3

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III
